diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how PUE is calculated as ratio of total facility energy to IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (includes IT + Cooling + Lighting + Losses)
diagrams.purpose: Understand PUE metric for data center efficiency measurement

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Illustrates how multiple virtual machines run on a single physical server
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how virtualization maximizes resource utilization

diagrams.title: Green IT Energy Flow
diagrams.description: Shows energy consumption breakdown in a typical IT environment
diagrams.purpose: Understand where energy is consumed in IT operations

diagrams.title: Data Center Cooling Approaches
diagrams.description: Compares different cooling methods from least to most efficient
diagrams.purpose: Learn various cooling technologies and their efficiency
